things.name: C-Mine Cultural Centre
things.description: Remarkable arts centre and design hub built within a beautifully repurposed former coal mine, a symbol of Genk's regeneration

things.name: Bokrijk Open Air Museum
things.description: Sprawling open-air museum with over 150 authentic historic Flemish buildings relocated and restored on a 550-hectare estate

things.name: Kattevennen Nature Reserve
things.description: Serene heathland and pine forest reserve with walking and cycling trails through the heart of the Flemish Campine landscape

things.name: Thor Central Park
things.description: Post-industrial innovation park on the former Waterschei coal mine site, with architecture, galleries and creative workspaces

things.name: Stellingmolen Windmill
things.description: Restored eighteenth-century post mill standing in open heathland, one of the best-preserved windmills in Belgian Limburg

things.name: De Witte Wieven Pond
things.description: Picturesque nature area with reed-fringed ponds popular for birdwatching and peaceful lakeside walks through heathland

things.name: Sculpture Walk Genk
things.description: Outdoor sculpture trail showcasing monumental works by Belgian and international artists throughout the city centre

things.name: Genk City Centre
things.description: Lively pedestrianised shopping and dining zone with multicultural restaurants reflecting Genk's rich immigrant heritage

things.name: De Maten Nature Reserve
things.description: Enchanting mosaic of ponds, marshes and woodland just outside the city, home to kingfishers, otters and rare dragonflies

things.name: Expositiezaal OC Stationsomgeving
things.description: Contemporary exhibition space near Genk station hosting rotating shows of local and regional visual art throughout the year
